description_long: This is a cylindrical white ceramic cup with a rounded handle attached to one side, suitable for holding hot beverages. The cup features two distinct printed elements: the phrase 'ENTER THE GAME' in black, modern font on one side, and the Gameloft logo with the company name on the opposite side. Inside the cup, there is a gray spoon standing upright, suggesting the cup is ready for stirring a drink. The surface of the cup is smooth and has a matte to slightly glossy finish, typical of glazed ceramics. The cup appears to be empty except for the spoon, and the interior is consistent in color with the exterior. The overall design is simple and functional, with branding elements that make it suitable for office or promotional use.
description: A white ceramic cup with a handle, featuring 'ENTER THE GAME' text on one side and the Gameloft logo on the other, with a spoon inside. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of a branded office mug.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the left and the 'ENTER THE GAME' text clearly visible on the cup's side.
description_view_1: Angled view with the handle mostly hidden, showing the edge of the 'ENTER THE GAME' text and part of the Gameloft logo.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the Gameloft logo and name prominently, with the handle on the right.
description_view_3: Rear view with the handle centered, showing both the edge of the Gameloft logo and the 'ENTER THE GAME' text partially visible.
